extensionDescription.message: Trace a link to its final destination with the 888desturl API.

heroCopy.message: Right-click on a page or link to trace the destination in the side panel without interrupting your browsing.

statusIdleDetail.message: Right-click a link, selected text, or anywhere on the page and select 'Check final destination'.

statusLoadingDetail.message: 888desturl API is tracing the final destination.

statusLoadingSlowDetail.message: API is still resolving the destination, please wait.

statusSuccessDetail.message: The result is ready. You can copy the URL or open the trace page.

errNoTab.message: Cannot find active tab to open side panel.

errSidePanelOpen.message: Failed to open Chrome side panel.

errInvalidUrl.message: The right-clicked item is not a valid HTTP/HTTPS URL.

errTimeout.message: Request timed out. Please try again later.

errFetchFailed.message: Failed to resolve the final destination.
